news.t: Boomer Retirement Wave Impacts Muni Bonds
All eyes are now on the bond market as oil prices fall. Will the Fed hike rates?
Higher Bond Yields Are Making Things Uncomfortable for Stock Investors
Fixed Income Markets in a Higher for Longer Environment
AI Debt Floods The Bond Market, And Fidelity Is Backing Away
Opinion | You're Probably Overinvested in Bonds
The Global Bond Rout Is Accelerating. Here's What to Know.
Yields surge to May 2025 highs as oil prices and inflation data rattle markets
Are Municipal Bonds Primed for a Summer Rebound?

overview.description: The iShares Short-Term National Muni Bond ETF (SUB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of investment-grade debt issued by state and local governments and agencies with remaining maturities from one month to five years. SUB was launched on Nov 5, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Boomer Retirement Wave Impacts Muni Bonds
data.text: By some estimates, 11,000 baby boomers retire each and every day. For those keeping score at home, that works out to be 4.1 million boomers leaving the traditional workforce every year.

data.title: All eyes are now on the bond market as oil prices fall. Will the Fed hike rates?
data.text: The $30 Treasury market is taking a wait-and-see approach to the U.S.-Iran peace framework deal and to Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Federal Reserve chair.

data.title: Higher Bond Yields Are Making Things Uncomfortable for Stock Investors
data.text: Bond markets are resetting ahead of key data, Treasury auctions, and a crucial Fed meeting.

data.title: Fixed Income Markets in a Higher for Longer Environment
data.text: Interest rates remain one of the primary concerns for investors as Kevin Warsh has officially assumed leadership at the U.S. Federal Reserve (Fed). While we believe the possibility of a rate cut has d...

data.title: AI Debt Floods The Bond Market, And Fidelity Is Backing Away
data.text: The artificial intelligence boom has spent three years as a stock market story. This year it became a bond market problem.

data.title: Muni Bond Sales Surge in 2026
data.text: Bloomberg's Aashah Shah joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." May has been a strong month for muni bond issuance, with about $35 billion of sales so far this year.

data.title: Opinion | You're Probably Overinvested in Bonds
data.text: The usual advice is to hold only 60% of your assets in stock. If you're wealthy, a 90/10 split is far better.

data.title: The Global Bond Rout Is Accelerating. Here's What to Know.
data.text: The 10-year Treasury yield is now close to 4.7%, threatening higher borrowing costs.
